fitRationale: Your resume already aligns well with this role's data pipeline ownership and cross-functional collaboration requirements.
missingDetailsQuestions: What is your best quantified reliability improvement example (e.g., incident reduction, SLA increase)?
Which projects best demonstrate ownership from business question to production implementation?
What specific tools from this role have you used most recently, and in what context?
tailoringSteps: Lead with a summary that mirrors the role's core priorities (pipeline ownership, reliability, business impact).
Move your strongest quantified impact bullet into the first two bullets of your latest role.
Rephrase 2-3 bullets to include exact role keywords and measurable outcomes.
Add one bullet showing cross-functional collaboration with Product/Analytics/Engineering.
Trim older or low-impact bullets to keep focus on relevant achievements.
